events.title: US Strikes Multiple Iranian Targets
events.desc: The US military announced the completion of its latest wave of strikes against Iran, targeting military installations across the country. These strikes occurred over a five-hour period and were authorized by President Trump.
events.location: Iran (multiple locations including Bushehr, Chah Bahar, Jask, Konarak, Abu Musa, Bandar Abbas)

events.title: Trump Threatens Attack on 'Pickaxe Mountain' Nuclear Facility
events.desc: President Donald Trump has explicitly threatened to target Iran's 'Pickaxe Mountain,' a heavily fortified underground nuclear facility, stating that the US will 'take out' this site and warning Iran to be ready.

events.title: Iran Claims Strike on US Air Base in Jordan
events.desc: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claimed to have targeted a US air base in Jordan with ballistic missiles, urging Jordanians to dismantle American bases in the kingdom.

events.title: US Imposes Maritime Blockade on Iran
events.desc: The US military announced the commencement of a maritime blockade on all of Iran's ports, oil terminals, and coastal areas, applicable to all vessel traffic regardless of flag.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes Amid Rising Tensions
events.desc: The US and Iran engaged in reciprocal strikes, with the US military targeting Iranian facilities and Iran claiming attacks on US bases in Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain, and Oman, exacerbating tensions over the Strait of Hormuz.
events.location: Strait of Hormuz / Persian Gulf / Regional Bases

events.title: UK Bans Support for IRGC Amid Escalation
events.desc: The United Kingdom announced a ban on providing support to Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), citing its links to death threats and intimidation within Britain.

events.title: Houthi Claims Attack on Saudi Airport in Retaliation
events.desc: Yemen's Houthi rebels stated they targeted Saudi Arabia's Abha airport in retaliation for a previous strike on Sanaa's international airport.

events.title: US-Iran Trust Broken; Pakistan Urges Talks
events.desc: Pakistan continues to advocate for dialogue between the US and Iran amidst renewed hostilities, though analysts suggest Pakistan has limited influence in de-escalating the current conflict.

events.title: US Strikes 'Capabilities Related to Strait of Hormuz'
events.desc: President Trump stated that the United States was targeting Iran's capabilities associated with the Strait of Hormuz as part of ongoing military actions.

events.title: US Military Completed Latest Strikes on Iran
events.desc: The US military confirmed the completion of its latest round of strikes against Iran, initiated earlier in the day at the direction of President Trump.

events.title: Trump Notifies Congress of Resumed Hostilities with Iran
events.desc: President Donald Trump formally notified Congress that hostilities against Iran resumed on July 7, initiating a new window for military action without immediate congressional approval.

events.title: Iranian-Born Engineer Convicted of Exporting Tech to Iran
events.desc: An Iranian-born engineer has been convicted in the US for conspiring to illegally export technology, potentially usable in military drones, to an Iranian company linked to the IRGC.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Fire Amid Oil Price Surge
events.desc: Renewed military actions between the US and Iran have coincided with Brent crude oil prices nearing $85 a barrel, signaling concerns over stability in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Lawmakers Demand Release of Findings on Iran School Strike
events.desc: Democratic senators are calling on the Trump administration to publicly disclose the findings of a US military investigation into a strike on a girls' school in Iran earlier this year, which initial reports suggested US forces may have been responsible for.

events.title: US Strikes Hit 90 Iranian Targets Amid Khamenei's Funeral
events.desc: The US Central Command reported striking 90 Iranian targets in the latest wave of attacks, which occurred as Iran held funeral ceremonies for its late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, resulting in reported fatalities.
